title: Papyrus #0486: Greek-Egyptian Marriage Contract
description: A Greek papyrus from Hellenistic/Roman Egypt — marriage contract document.
introduction: A Greek papyrus from Hellenistic/Roman Egypt — marriage contract document.

translation.text: From the papyrus collections of Greco-Roman Egypt: a marriage contract document preserved in the dry sands. These papyri document daily life in ways no monumental inscription can.
